growth_records.cite: Plugge CM et al. Metabolic Flexibility of Sulfate-Reducing Bacteria. Frontiers in Microbiology (2011). DOI:10.3389/fmicb.2011.00081. [PMC3119409]
growth_records.snippet: Syntrophobacter sulfatireducens | Propionate n.d.* | Propionate + sulfate 0.12 | Chen et al. (2005)
growth_records.notes: Table 1. Primary source cited = Chen et al. (2005). Reported mu = 0.12 day-1 on propionate + sulfate; mu_h = 0.12/24 = 0.005 h-1; doubling_time = ln2/0.005 = 138.6 h. Propionate-only rate marked n.d. (capable of syntrophic growth but rate not determined).
